title: European defense startups eye commercial deals and hiring push in the Middle East amid the Iran war
summary_full: A crop of emerging defense companies in Europe are fielding increasing interest from Middle East militaries as conflict continues in the region.
summary_public: A crop of emerging defense companies in Europe are fielding increasing interest from Middle East militaries as conflict continues in the region.
